title: AUGMANITAI — 1000-Term Compendium
description: AUGMANITAI is a curated terminology framework for phenomena at the human–AI interface. The core deliverable is the 1000-Term Compendium, formalized as an RDF knowledge graph informed by ISO 704 / ISO 1087 / ISO 30042 (ISO-inspired, not ISO-certified) and serialized with W3C SKOS, SKOS-XL, OntoLex-Lemon, SHACL, and JSON-LD. Descriptive linguistic research, longitudinal n=1 terminological priority deposit (non-peer-reviewed per §11). See DISCLAIMER.md (§1–§20) for the full ethical disclaimer and restricted-application clause (§20).
